/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Argus.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Argus.dir/src/CPUMetric.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Argus.dir/src/DiskMetric.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Argus.dir/src/HardwareMetric.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Argus.dir/src/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Argus.dir/src/MemoryMetric.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Argus.dir/src/Metric.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Argus.dir/src/NetworkMetric.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Argus.dir/src/ThresholdMetric.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Argus.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o Argus
